zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Somerville於大約1118年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾維諾時，他的父親Gaulter Somerville49歲，母親Cecily de Lunsie25歲。他於大約1148年與Matilda le Boteler在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1190年享年73歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭洛包爾林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Somerville于大约1118年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾維諾时，他的父亲Gaulter Somerville49岁，母亲Cecily de Lunsie25岁。他于大约1148年与Matilda le Boteler在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1190年享年73岁，埋葬在苏格兰洛包爾林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Siemer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Helmuth, Otto, Theresia.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Siegmar, composed of the elements sigi ‘victory’ + mari, meri ‘famous’.

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Somerville was born about 1118, in Wychnor, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gaulter Somerville, was 49 and his mother, Cecily de Lunsie, was 25. He married Matilda le Boteler about 1148, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1190, at the age of 73, and was buried in Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Somerville est né environ 1118, à Wychnor, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gaulter Somerville, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Lunsie, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Matilda le Boteler environ 1148, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1190, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Linton, Roxburghshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Somerville um 1118 in Wychnor, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gaulter Somerville 49 und seine Mutter Cecily de Lunsie 25. Er hat um 1148 in Schottland, United Kingdom Matilda le Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1190 im Alter von 73 Jahren und wurde in Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Somerville è nato il circa 1118 nel Wychnor, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gaulter Somerville, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Cecily de Lunsie, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Matilda le Boteler circa 1148, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1190, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Somervilleが約1118年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウイチノーで生まれた時，父Gaulter Somervilleは49歳，母Cecily de Lunsieは25歳であった。約1148年にイギリススコットランドでMatilda le Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1190年に73歳で死去し，スコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Somerville(이)가 대략 1118년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 윈이ch너에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gaulter Somerville(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily de Lunsie(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1148년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Matilda le Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1190년 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 린턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Somerville nasceu aproximadamente 1118, em Wychnor, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gaulter Somerville, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de Lunsie, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda le Boteler aproximadamente 1148, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1190, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Somerville родился около 1118 г. в местности вичнор, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gaulter Somerville было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Lunsie, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda le Boteler около 1148 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1190 г. в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности линтон, роксбургшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Somerville nació aproximadamente 1118, en Wychnor, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Gaulter Somerville, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Cecily de Lunsie, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Matilda le Boteler aproximadamente 1148, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1190, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland.
